description: Style Note These stylish Techno floaters from puma make a trendy style statement combined with superior performance. These are great for regular wear as they ensure superior traction and protection to the feet, without compromising on comfort and style. You can also team this pair with jeans and tees for a great casual look. Product Details Blunt toed TPU footbed with ankle loops and forefoot straps that have Velcro closures Honeycomb texturing on the footbed TPU outsole with aggressive lugs and nubs Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner and polish or wax on leather parts Do not store in direct sunlight
